title: Schliff v7.0 Design Spec — Multi-Format, Security, Batch, Playground, Leaderboard
author: Franz Paul + Claude Opus 4.6
thesis: Schliff wins by scoring any agent instruction file across 8 dimensions including security. Breadth (multi-format) + depth (security, anti-gaming) + virality (leaderboard, playground). Develop with Anthropic, not against them.

architecture.pattern: FormatProfile frozen dataclass with function pointers (no inheritance, no ABC)
architecture.backward_compat: SKILL.md FormatProfile produces identical scores to v6.3.0. All existing APIs keep signatures. fmt parameter is Optional with None default.

features.name: schliff score --url <github-url>
features.use_case: Show HN: 'schliff score --url https://github.com/...' in every comment reply

features.name: Security Scoring Dimension

categories.name: prompt_injection
categories.detects: instruction override, role hijacking, hidden directives

categories.name: data_exfiltration
categories.detects: exfil URLs, suspicious domains, secret harvesting

categories.name: obfuscation
categories.detects: base64 payloads, zero-width chars, homoglyphs, hex escapes

categories.name: overpermission
categories.detects: unrestricted access requests, broad tool permissions

categories.name: missing_boundaries
categories.detects: positive security patterns (do not execute, sandbox, restricted)

false_positive_mitigation.filter_1: Code-block exclusion (regex in code blocks ignored, except obfuscation)
false_positive_mitigation.filter_2: Meta-discourse detection (penalty halved when skill DESCRIBES attacks, not PERFORMS them)
false_positive_mitigation.filter_3: Frontmatter security-signal (penalty halved for categories 1+3 when skill name/description indicates security domain)

features.test_plan: 12 unit tests + 4 golden files (benign, malicious, security-training, borderline)

features.name: Directory/Batch Mode

commands.schliff score <dir>: Score all instruction files in directory
commands.schliff verify <dir>: CI gate for directories (exit 1 if ANY file below threshold)

output.default: summary table (file, score, grade, coverage, issues)

features.doctor_evolution: also scans project-local CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, AGENTS.md with partial scoring

features.name: Web Playground (schliff.dev/play)
features.approach: serverless Python API (Vercel/Cloudflare), stateless POST endpoint
features_list: Paste SKILL.md content, get instant score
Pre-loaded demo examples (bad skill, ShieldClaw before/after)
features.why: Eliminates install prerequisite. Every blog post/tweet links here. Highest conversion impact per effort.

features.name: GitHub Action (real, published to Marketplace)
features_list: runs-on: ubuntu-latest, uses python, pip install schliff
PR comment with score table + dimension breakdown
Exit code 1 on failure for branch protection
features.why: README already shows 'uses: Zandereins/schliff@v6' but it 404s. Silent conversion killer.

features.name: Public Leaderboard (skills.schliff.dev)
features.approach: static site (Next.js or plain HTML) + serverless API for submissions
features_list: Top skills by composite score, by dimension, by format
No user accounts — GitHub URL + skill name + score JSON
viral_mechanics: Badge links back to leaderboard entry

features.name: Tests + Docs + Release
tasks: Unit tests for all new features (target: 600+ total)
README update: new features, new CLI examples

out_of_scope_v7: Rust rewrite for speed (not needed yet)

multi_format: schliff score SKILL.md produces identical score to v6.3.0 (regression test)
schliff score CLAUDE.md scores partial dimensions, labels coverage
schliff score .cursorrules works with no frontmatter
schliff score AGENTS.md handles optional frontmatter
schliff score --format generic works on any .md file
security: ShieldClaw SKILL.md does NOT false-positive (meta-discourse mitigation)
Code blocks excluded from scanning (except obfuscation)
batch: schliff score skills/ scores all SKILL.md files
schliff verify skills/ exits 1 on failure
playground: POST /api/score with SKILL.md content returns JSON score

why_this_impresses: Multi-format = 'We serve the whole ecosystem, not just Claude Code'
Security dimension = direct answer to ToxicSkills (Snyk 2026)
Leaderboard = 'We measure the quality of the ecosystem YOU built'
No runtime scoring focus = we don't compete with Claude Code's runtime
Open methodology = Anthropic can adopt/reference without reinventing
what_we_dont_build: Runtime behavior testing (Anthropic owns the runtime)

outreach_plan.april_2026: Email Claude Code PM: 'Schliff v7.0: Multi-Format Skill Quality Standard — Let's Talk'
outreach_plan.june_2026: Invite 3 Anthropic engineers to Scoring Council

tagline_v7: Score any agent instruction file — SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, AGENTS.md — across 8 dimensions including security. In one command. Zero dependencies. Zero LLM.
